Find sources: "PS Lampung Sakti" news newspapers books scholar JSTOR July 2020 Learn how and when to remove this message Learn how and when to remove this message Football club .mw-parser-output .infobox-subbox .mw-parser-output .infobox-3cols-child .mw-parser-output .infobox .navbar screen screen and prefers-color-scheme:dark min-width:640px body.skin--responsive .mw-parser-output .infobox-table caption body.skin--responsive .mw-parser-output .infobox-table tbody body.skin--responsive .mw-parser-output .infobox-table th,body.skin--responsive .mw-parser-output .infobox-table td body.skin-minerva .mw-parser-output .infobox table body.skin-minerva .mw-parser-output .infobox caption PS Lampung Sakti Full name Persatuan Sepakbola Lampung Sakti Nickname The Lampung Elephant Founded 2017 ; 9 years ago 2017 Dissolved 2019 ; 7 years ago 2019 Ground Sumpah Pemuda Stadium Capacity 25,000 Owner PT Great Giant Pineapple Company GGPC 2018 Liga 3 , Round of 16 National Home colours Away colours Persatuan Sepakbola Lampung Sakti simply known as PS Lampung Sakti is an Indonesian football club based in Bandar Lampung , Lampung . This club owned by PT Great Giant Pineapple Company GGPC Humas Jaya. 1 History edit Previously, PS Lampung Sakti was named Persires Sukoharjo . Persires changed their name 7 times. In 1962, Persires was based in Rengat and used Persires Rengat as their club name. In the middle of 2011, the club merged with Bali Devata and was re-named Persires Bali Devata . Then they changed their name to Persires Banjarnegara after their move to Banjarnegara . In 2013, they moved again to Cirebon and changed the name again to Persires Cirebon . In 2014, they moved to Mashud Wisnusaputra Stadium , Kuningan and was re-named Persires Kuningan . In 2015, they moved to Sukoharjo and changed their name again. Name change edit Persires Rengat 1962; lists of the major shareholder of the Indragiri Hulu Regency Government Persires Bali Devata 2011 2012; merging with Bali Devata Persires Banjarnegara 2013; home base at Banjarnegara Persires Cirebon 2013; homebase at Watubelah Stadium , Cirebon Persires Kuningan 2014; homebase at Mashud Wisnusaputra Stadium , Kuningan Persires Sukoharjo 2015 2017; homebase at Gelora Merdeka Jombor Stadium , Sukoharjo PS Lampung Sakti 2017 2019 Stadium edit In 2017 Liga 2 the club used Sumpah Pemuda Stadium for their home matches. 2 Season-by-season records edit As Persires Rengat Season League Tier Tms. Pos. Name change edit Persires Rengat 1962; lists of the major shareholder of the Indragiri Hulu Regency Government Persires Bali Devata 2011 2012; merging with Bali Devata Persires Banjarnegara 2013; home base at Banjarnegara Persires Cirebon 2013; homebase at Watubelah Stadium , Cirebon Persires Kuningan 2014; homebase at Mashud Wisnusaputra Stadium , Kuningan Persires Sukoharjo 2015 2017; homebase at Gelora Merdeka Jombor Stadium , Sukoharjo PS Lampung Sakti 2017 2019 Stadium edit In 2017 Liga 2 the club used Sumpah Pemuda Stadium for their home matches.
